name: Brie and Red Pepper Mini-Quiches
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Finely Chopped Sweet Red Peppers
1/2 pound Brie cheese, cut into small cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. On a lightly floured surface, roll out the pastry thinly.
2. Line thirty-six 2 1/4-inch (6cm) tartlet tins with the rolled-out pastry.
3. Line each tin with foil and weight down with pie weights or dried beans.
4. Bake in a 375°F (190°C) oven for 10 minutes.
5. Remove the foil and pie weights; let cool.
6. In a skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
7. Sauté the red peppers until they are softened.
8. Spoon the sautéed peppers into the tart shells.
9. Top each with cheese cubes, then bacon pieces.
10. In a bowl, beat together eggs and whipping cream. Season with salt and cayenne pepper to taste.
11. Pour the egg mixture over the filling in each tart shell.
12. Bake in a 350°F (180°C) oven for 10 to 15 minutes, or until the filling is firm.
13. Serve immediately.
(Tarts can be cooled and frozen in airtight containers. To reheat, bake frozen tartlets at 375°F (190°C) for 10 minutes, or until heated through.)
